creator: denverh@comcast.net
text:
After upgrading my system from 3.2 to 4.1 and updating all the installed applications, zim fails to run.  Everything else works OK.  The error reported is:

This is zim 0.75.2
Platform: posix
Locale: en_US UTF-8
FS encoding: utf-8
Python: (3, 9, 19, 'final', 0)
PyGObject: (3, 42, 2)

======= Traceback =======
  File "/usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/zim/main/__init__.py", line 962, in main
    ZIM_APPLICATION.run(*argv[1:])
  File "/usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/zim/main/__init__.py", line 733, in run
    self._run_cmd(cmd, args) # test seam
  File "/usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/zim/main/__init__.py", line 764, in _run_cmd
    self._run_main_loop(cmd)
  File "/usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/zim/main/__init__.py", line 806, in _run_main_loop
    w = cmd.run()
  File "/usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/zim/main/__init__.py", line 268, in run
    notebook, pagelink = self.build_notebook()
  File "/usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/zim/main/__init__.py", line 240, in build_notebook
    notebook, uripagelink = build_notebook(notebookinfo) # can raise FileNotFound
  File "/usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/zim/notebook/__init__.py", line 130, in build_notebook
    notebook = Notebook.new_from_dir(folder)
  File "/usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/zim/notebook/notebook.py", line 268, in new_from_dir
    index = Index(cache_dir.file('index.db').path, layout)
  File "/usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/zim/notebook/index/__init__.py", line 66, in __init__
    self._db_connect()
  File "/usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/zim/notebook/index/__init__.py", line 119, in _db_connect
    self._db_recover()
  File "/usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/zim/notebook/index/__init__.py", line 136, in _db_recover
    self._db_init()
  File "/usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/zim/notebook/index/__init__.py", line 139, in _db_init
    tables = [r[0] for r in self._db.execute(
OperationalError: no such column: "table" - should this be a string literal in single-quotes?

The same thing happens on a fresh install on a second system.  If I comment out the line indicated, __init__.py", line 139, it seems to work OK.  I checked my backup copy from before the upgrade, and that line was present, so something else has changed, possibly in sqlite.
